target.name: Calmodulin
target.prediction_scope: Preview-first reference. Folded object would be one 148-residue calmodulin chain; the 4 bound Ca2+ ions are not predicted.
target.omitted_context: Reference preview is 1CLL chain A protein atoms only (Ca2+ stripped). Bundled offline Fold needs a generated demo cache; until then, Fold requires the local backend.
